features.description: New chat button creates a fresh conversation
steps: Navigate to main interface
Click the 'New Chat' button
Verify a new conversation is created
Check that chat area shows welcome state
Verify conversation appears in sidebar

features.description: User can type a message and press Enter to send
steps: Open a new chat
Type a query in the input box
Press Enter
Verify the user message appears in the chat area
Verify the AI response streams back

features.description: Conversation history persists across page reloads
steps: Send 3 messages in a chat
Reload the page
Verify all 3 messages are still visible
Verify the conversation still appears in the sidebar

features.description: Theme switching between light and dark mode
steps: Click the theme toggle in settings
Verify the UI switches to dark mode immediately
Reload the page
Verify the theme preference is persisted

features.description: Sidebar collapses and expands on narrow screens
steps: Resize the browser window to <768px width
Verify the sidebar auto-collapses
Click the hamburger icon
Verify the sidebar expands as an overlay

features.description: Delete a conversation from the sidebar
steps: Right-click a conversation in the sidebar
Select 'Delete'
Confirm the deletion in the dialog
Verify the conversation is removed from the sidebar
Verify it cannot be accessed via URL

features.description: Search conversations by keyword in sidebar
steps: Type a keyword in the sidebar search box
Verify matching conversations are filtered
Verify non-matching conversations are hidden
Clear the search to see all conversations again

features.description: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+K opens new chat
steps: Press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K on Linux/Windows)
Verify a new chat is created immediately
Verify the input box is focused

features.description: Network error during message send shows retry option
steps: Simulate network offline
Try to send a message
Verify an error banner appears with 'Retry' button
Restore network and click 'Retry'
Verify the message is sent successfully

features.description: Initial page load under 2 seconds on 3G simulation
steps: Open DevTools Network tab and throttle to 'Slow 3G'
Hard reload the page
Verify the first contentful paint is < 2.0 seconds
Verify the main UI is interactive within 3.0 seconds
